---
title: "displacement_from_reference_points"
generated: true
description: "Displacement of a centre of mass (point cloud) from a reference."
---

[‚Äπ back to `nitrix.geometry.coords`](../nitrix-geometry-coords.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:displacement_from_reference_points -->
```python
displacement_from_reference_points(weight: Float[Array, '... n_regions n_points'], reference: Float[Array, '... n_regions ndim'], coords: Float[Array, '... n_points ndim'], *, radius: Optional[float] = None) -> Float[Array, '... n_regions ndim']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:displacement_from_reference_points -->
Displacement of a centre of mass (point cloud) from a reference.

Computes the per-region centre of mass over the point cloud (see
[`center_of_mass_points`](../nitrix-geometry-coords/center_of_mass_points.qmd)) and subtracts a per-region reference
coordinate. This is the point-cloud analogue of
[`displacement_from_reference_grid`](../nitrix-geometry-coords/displacement_from_reference_grid.qmd).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:displacement_from_reference_points -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `weight` | `Float` | `...` √ó `n_regions` √ó `n_points` | ‚Äî | Non-negative weights, `(..., n_regions, n_points)` -- one row per region, one column per point. |
| `reference` | `Float` | `...` √ó `n_regions` √ó `ndim` | ‚Äî | Per-region reference coordinates, `(..., n_regions, ndim)`. |
| `coords` | `Float` | `...` √ó `n_points` √ó `ndim` | ‚Äî | Per-point coordinates, `(..., n_points, ndim)`. |
| `radius` | `Optional[float]` | ‚Äî | `None` | Optional sphere radius. If given, the centre of mass is projected onto a sphere of that radius before the displacement is taken. |

**Returns** `Float` ‚Äî shape `...` √ó `n_regions` √ó `ndim`. The per-region displacement `cm - reference`, where `cm` is the weighted centre of mass of the point cloud.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen perf:displacement_from_reference_points -->
:::: {.callout-note title="Benchmarks ‚Äî nitrix-perf-bench" collapse="true"}
GPU steady-state **117.1 ¬µs** (median, L4); up to **3.8√ó faster** than `numpy.weighted_mean`.  [full report](https://github.com/hypercoil/nitrix-perf-bench/blob/main/reports/PERF_DISPLACEMENT_FROM_REFERENCE_POINTS.md)

::: {.table-responsive}
| case | platform | param | baseline | status | steady (min/med) | compile | mem | fidelity | ratio |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| displacement_from_reference_points | jax-cpu | p=1024 | `cupy.displacement_from_reference_points` | skipped | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| displacement_from_reference_points | jax-cpu | p=1024 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 60.4 ¬µs / 61.9 ¬µs | 65.55 ms | 718 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.00028√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| displacement_from_reference_points | jax-cpu | p=1024 | `numpy.weighted_mean` | ok | 40.2 ¬µs / 40.5 ¬µs | 100.3 ¬µs | 718 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.00021√ótol | 0.67x vs nitrix-jax |
| displacement_from_reference_points | jax-cuda12 | p=1024 | `cupy.displacement_from_reference_points` | ok | 150.0 ¬µs / 155.5 ¬µs | 141.67 ms | 0.27 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.00013√ótol | 1.32x vs nitrix-jax |
| displacement_from_reference_points | jax-cuda12 | p=1024 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 113.9 ¬µs / 117.1 ¬µs | 386.49 ms | 71.58 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.00014√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| displacement_from_reference_points | jax-cuda12 | p=1024 | `numpy.weighted_mean` | ok | 41.0 ¬µs / 41.7 ¬µs | 92.3 ¬µs | 0.27 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.00021√ótol | 0.36x vs nitrix-jax |
| displacement_from_reference_points | jax-cpu | p=16384 | `cupy.displacement_from_reference_points` | skipped | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| displacement_from_reference_points | jax-cpu | p=16384 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 382.2 ¬µs / 388.7 ¬µs | 139.87 ms | 718 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.00035√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| displacement_from_reference_points | jax-cpu | p=16384 | `numpy.weighted_mean` | ok | 487.0 ¬µs / 489.6 ¬µs | 912.8 ¬µs | 718 MB (rss) | ‚úì 8.4e-05√ótol | 1.27x vs nitrix-jax |
| displacement_from_reference_points | jax-cuda12 | p=16384 | `cupy.displacement_from_reference_points` | ok | 149.1 ¬µs / 152.6 ¬µs | 138.30 ms | 4.39 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 6.1e-05√ótol | 1.16x vs nitrix-jax |
| displacement_from_reference_points | jax-cuda12 | p=16384 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 129.1 ¬µs / 137.2 ¬µs | 513.57 ms | 75.74 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 5.3e-05√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| displacement_from_reference_points | jax-cuda12 | p=16384 | `numpy.weighted_mean` | ok | 490.0 ¬µs / 496.0 ¬µs | 580.4 ¬µs | 4.39 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 8.4e-05√ótol | 3.80x vs nitrix-jax |
| displacement_from_reference_points | jax-cpu | p=4096 | `cupy.displacement_from_reference_points` | skipped | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| displacement_from_reference_points | jax-cpu | p=4096 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 125.9 ¬µs / 127.9 ¬µs | 100.18 ms | 718 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.00039√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| displacement_from_reference_points | jax-cpu | p=4096 | `numpy.weighted_mean` | ok | 144.7 ¬µs / 169.1 ¬µs | 221.0 ¬µs | 718 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.00015√ótol | 1.15x vs nitrix-jax |
| displacement_from_reference_points | jax-cuda12 | p=4096 | `cupy.displacement_from_reference_points` | ok | 148.7 ¬µs / 154.2 ¬µs | 139.91 ms | 1.10 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 8.6e-05√ótol | 1.33x vs nitrix-jax |
| displacement_from_reference_points | jax-cuda12 | p=4096 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 111.9 ¬µs / 117.1 ¬µs | 528.45 ms | 84.99 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 9.3e-05√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| displacement_from_reference_points | jax-cuda12 | p=4096 | `numpy.weighted_mean` | ok | 174.3 ¬µs / 175.3 ¬µs | 249.9 ¬µs | 1.10 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.00015√ótol | 1.56x vs nitrix-jax |
:::

*source: bench `2a974f27` ¬∑ nitrix `5d1717e0`*
::::
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:displacement_from_reference_points -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `n_regions` | *(undocumented ‚Äî add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `n_points` | *(undocumented ‚Äî add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `ndim` | number of spatial dimensions |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
